message.content:
프로젝트 경로: C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\DAESUNG_FINETECH\NoiseTest_Daesung

MSBuild로 빌드해줘. VS2019 MSBuild 경로 사용:
"C:\Program Files (x86)\Microsoft Visual Studio\2019\Professional\MSBuild\Current\Bin\MSBuild.exe"

Debug 구성으로 빌드하고 결과 보고해줘.

input.command: ls "C:/Program Files (x86)/Microsoft Visual Studio/2019/Professional/MSBuild/Current/Bin/MSBuild.exe" 2>/dev/null && echo "MSBuild 존재" || echo "MSBuild 경로 없음"

content.text: VS2019 MSBuild 경로가 존재하지 않습니다. 설치된 MSBuild를 찾아보겠습니다.

input.command: "C:/Program Files (x86)/Microsoft Visual Studio/Installer/vswhere.exe" -property installationPath 2>/dev/null || echo "vswhere 없음"

content.text: VS2019가 아닌 VS2022와 VS 18(Preview/Community)가 설치되어 있습니다. 사용 가능한 MSBuild를 찾겠습니다.

input.command: ls "C:/Program Files (x86)/Microsoft Visual Studio/2022/"*"/MSBuild/Current/Bin/MSBuild.exe" 2>/dev/null; ls "C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/2022/"*"/MSBuild/Current/Bin/MSBuild.exe" 2>/dev/null; ls "C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/"*"/MSBuild/Current/Bin/MSBuild.exe" 2>/dev/null

content.content:
C:/Program Files (x86)/Microsoft Visual Studio/2022/BuildTools/MSBuild/Current/Bin/MSBuild.exe*
C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community/MSBuild/Current/Bin/MSBuild.exe*
C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Insiders/MSBuild/Current/Bin/MSBuild.exe*

content.text:
VS2019는 설치되어 있지 않습니다. 사용 가능한 MSBuild는 다음 3개입니다:

1. **VS2022 BuildTools**: `C:/Program Files (x86)/Microsoft Visual Studio/2022/BuildTools/MSBuild/Current/Bin/MSBuild.exe`
2. **VS2026 Community**: `C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Community/MSBuild/Current/Bin/MSBuild.exe`
3. **VS2026 Insiders**: `C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/18/Insiders/MSBuild/Current/Bin/MSBuild.exe`

.NET Framework 4.8 프로젝트이므로 VS2022 BuildTools의 MSBuild를 사용하여 빌드하겠습니다.
